hero.label: UGC Creator — AI & SaaS
hero.subheadline: I film authentic product videos AND build working demo pages. One creator, double leverage.

work.label: Portfolio
work.heading: Recent work
work.description: Authentic product videos for AI tools and SaaS platforms. Each project includes a working demo page.
work.cta_text: All videos include raw files + working demo page URL.

services.label: Services
services.heading: What you get
services.description: Straightforward packages. No hidden fees, no agency overhead.

video.name: UGC Video
video.description: Authentic product video optimized for paid social and landing pages.

combo.name: UGC + Demo Combo
combo.description: Three UGC videos plus a custom landing page demo, built and deployed.

founder.name: Founder Story
founder.description: Full-stack content production for pre-launch or growth-stage founders.

process.label: Process
process.heading: Four days. Done.
process.description: No long onboarding. No endless back-and-forth. Scoped, shipped, delivered.

steps.name: Brief
steps.description: Kickoff call to align on brand voice, target audience, and key messaging. I take notes so you don't have to.
steps.detail: Kickoff call · Brand voice alignment · Asset collection

steps.name: Script + Demo
steps.description: Scripts written and reviewed. Demo landing page built in Bolt with real product context, deployed and shareable.
steps.detail: Script drafts · Demo page built · Review sync

steps.name: Filming
steps.description: Videos shot in 2–3 delivery styles: screen record, talking head, or product close-up. All in one session.
steps.detail: Multi-style shooting · Natural lighting · Authentic tone

steps.name: Delivery
steps.description: Final cut + raw footage zipped. Demo page URL live. Everything labeled and ready for your team.
steps.detail: Final files · Raw footage · Demo URL

about.label: About
about.heading: Engineer who learned to sell what he builds.
about.para1: I'm Ihor. Linux engineer turned UGC creator, based in Munich. I spent years building software before realizing my edge: I can sell what I build, because I understand it.
about.para2: Most UGC creators can talk about your product. I can also build it. When you hire me, you get authentic video AND a working demo to A/B test against your live page. No middleman, no agency markup.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's build something
contact.email_card_description: Drop me a line directly. I respond within 24 hours.
contact.success_body: I'll get back to you within 24 hours. Talk soon.

form.message_placeholder: What does it do? Who is it for? What do you want the video to achieve?
